name: Colorama Typosquat Campaigns (Fade Stealer)
description: Multiple typosquat packages targeting the popular colorama library. 2024 campaign deploys Fade Stealer malware stealing browser credentials, Discord tokens, crypto wallets, Telegram sessions, and keystrokes. Earlier 2018 campaign hijacked Bitcoin clipboard addresses.
remediation: Verify you have legitimate 'colorama' (author: Jonathan Hartley)
Uninstall any typosquat variants: pip uninstall colourama colarama yocolor colorama-api coloramapkgs
Rotate browser-saved passwords, Discord tokens, crypto wallet keys
Check for clipboard monitoring processes on Windows
Verify pip config points to real pypi.org, not fake mirrors
